---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, improvement, or companion skill for the OpenClaw Skills bundle
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear description of what the problem is. Ex. "I am frustrated when [...] because [...]"

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear description of what you want to happen, ideally with example trigger phrases or workflow steps.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Other ways to solve the same problem today.

**Which part of the stack does this affect?**
- [ ] grok-persistent-state (memory / registry patterns)
- [ ] mcp-openclaw-bridge (MCP → ClawHub skill patterns)
- [ ] smithery-mcp-orchestrator (Smithery discovery, auth, token scoping)
- [ ] Documentation / examples / combined workflows
- [ ] New companion skill idea (please describe pairing with the existing trio)
- [ ] Publishing / repo tooling
- [ ] Other

**Additional context**
Add any other context, mock SKILL.md sections, or references to Genesis Conductor / ClawHub patterns.

**Would you be willing to contribute a draft?**
- [ ] Yes (I can submit a PR following the CONTRIBUTING guidelines)
- [ ] No, just the idea

Thank you — clear, well-scoped ideas that respect the existing safety, pairing, and professionalism standards are highly valued.
